allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force })

PowerShell($pid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if \($pid\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; "Killed PID $pid" } else { "Port 3001 already free" })

PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Killed PID $p" } else { "Port 3001 already free" })
